name: pods-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM PODS (Principles of Database Systems): theory-vs-systems venue routing, the multi-cycle submission calendar, lightweight double-anonymous EasyChair review with a shepherded revision round, the acmsmall page budget, proof-appendix and full-version-on-arXiv rigor, and PACMMOD PODS-track publication.

plugins.name: pods-skills
plugins.description: Twelve PODS-specific skills for the ACM SIGMOD/SIGACT Symposium on Principles of Database Systems and its PACMMOD PODS-track publication model, grounded in the PODS 2026/2027 calls, the sigmod.org PODS pages, the ACM Digital Library / PACMMOD, and dblp.
